title: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING

figures_detected.description: Two diagrams showing towing hook locations: upper image shows front towing hook location on the vehicle front bumper area; lower image shows rear towing hook location on the vehicle underside/rear bumper area.

content_blocks.text: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING
Always pull the cable straight out from the vehicle. Never pull on the hook at a sideways angle.

content_blocks.description: Towing hook locations on vehicle front and rear
